FR-01.title: User Registration
requirements: Register with phone number or email
Set delivery address with map pin

FR-02.title: Store Browsing
requirements: Display nearby grocery stores based on location
Store details with hours, delivery time, and minimum order
acceptance_criteria: Nearby stores shown based on GPS

FR-03.title: Product Catalog
requirements: Browse products by category and subcategory
Product details with nutritional info and alternatives

FR-04.title: Smart Shopping Lists
requirements: Add items from browsing or manually
acceptance_criteria: Items added from catalog or text

FR-05.title: Shopping Cart
requirements: Cart total with delivery fee and taxes

FR-09.title: Shopper App
requirements: View assigned orders with item lists
Mark order as ready for delivery

FR-10.title: Rating and Tips
requirements: Refund request for missing or damaged items

FR-01.title: Build User Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (phone/email). Address CRUD with geocoding. Multiple address support with default. Referral code validation and credit system.

FR-01.title: Build Registration Screens
FR-01.description: Create sign-up, address setup with map pin picker, address book management, and referral code input during registration.

FR-02.title: Build Store Listing API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/stores (nearby by lat/lng, radius). Store details with hours, delivery_time_estimate, min_order. Categories. Search by name.

FR-02.title: Build Store Browse Screen
FR-02.description: Create store list with cards (logo, name, delivery time, min order), category tabs, featured carousel, and search bar.

FR-03.title: Build Product Catalog API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/stores/:id/products (by category, search, offers). Product detail with nutrition data and alternatives. Special offer pricing with badge.

FR-03.title: Build Product Browse UI
FR-03.description: Create category sidebar, product grid with images/prices/add-to-cart, search with autocomplete, product detail modal with nutrition info, and offers section with discount badges.

FR-04.title: Build Shopping List API
FR-04.description: Create CRUD for lists. POST /api/lists/:id/items (from catalog or text). Recurring list scheduler. POST /api/lists/:id/share (generate invite link).

FR-04.title: Build Shopping List UI
FR-04.description: Create list manager with add items (catalog search or manual input), checkbox per item, recurring toggle with frequency, and share button with link.

FR-05.title: Build Cart API
FR-05.description: Create cart CRUD with quantity, weight-based pricing estimation, substitution preferences per item (allow/specific/deny). Calculate total with delivery fee and applicable taxes.

FR-05.title: Build Cart Screen
FR-05.description: Create cart with item list, quantity adjusters, weight estimate display, substitution preference selectors, and order summary with fees breakdown.

FR-06.title: Build Delivery Scheduling API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/delivery/slots (available windows). POST /api/orders (with slot selection). Express delivery surcharge. Delivery instructions field.

FR-06.title: Build Checkout Flow
FR-06.description: Create checkout with delivery address confirmation, time slot grid (express highlighted), delivery instructions textarea, and order review with place order button.

FR-07.title: Build Order Tracking API
FR-07.description: Create WebSocket for live status updates. Shopper in-store tracking. POST /api/orders/:id/substitution (propose to customer). Driver GPS tracking broadcast.

FR-07.title: Build Tracking Screen
FR-07.description: Create order tracking with status timeline, shopper progress bar, substitution approval popup, and delivery map with driver position.

FR-08.title: Build Payment API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/payments/process (card/wallet). Tip distribution to shopper and driver. Split payment support. Final charge adjusted for substitutions.

FR-08.title: Build Payment UI
FR-08.description: Create payment method selector, tip preset buttons for shopper and driver, split payment between users form, and receipt with final adjusted total.

FR-09.title: Build Shopper App API
FR-09.description: Create GET /api/shopper/orders (assigned). POST /api/shopper/orders/:id/scan (barcode validation). POST /api/shopper/orders/:id/substitute (notify customer). POST /api/shopper/orders/:id/ready.

FR-09.title: Build Shopper App Screens
FR-09.description: Create shopper order view with item checklist, barcode scanner for verification, substitution suggestion flow with customer chat, and ready-for-delivery button.

FR-10.title: Build Rating and Issues API
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/orders/:id/rate (shopper_rating, driver_rating). PATCH /api/orders/:id/tip (adjust). POST /api/orders/:id/issue (report problem). POST /api/orders/:id/refund.

FR-10.title: Build Post-Delivery UI
FR-10.description: Create post-delivery screen with separate star ratings for shopper and driver, tip adjustment, issue report form with photo upload, and refund request for specific items.
